programme.title: Newsmax TV
programme.desc: Newsmax covers the latest developments in politics, national and world news, health, faith, personal finance, and technology with a unique American perspective and topics that the major media often ignore.

programme.title: OAN Plus
programme.desc: Tune in to OAN Plus for the nation’s top rated prime time political talk shows and get informed!

programme.title: AWE Plus
programme.desc: AWE Plus is your vicarious living channel. Enjoy awe-inspiring travel destinations, outrageous cars, amazing homes and much more.

programme.title: Qello
programme.desc: Stingray Qello presents your front-row seat to concerts by your favorite artists, bands, and musicians! Experience the encore with thrilling concert-films and get up close and personal with award-winning documentaries.

programme.title: Karaoke
programme.desc: Gather with friends to sing your heart out to your favorite tracks with Stingray Karaoke. From yesterday’s golden oldies to today’s hits, we got you!

programme.title: Naturescape
programme.desc: Stingray Naturescape offers you an escape to a world of stunning nature scenes, all set to peaceful soundtracks. Relax to a crackling fireplace, soar over a tropical paradise, or get inspired by a sparkling night sky, all from the comfort of home.

programme.title: Classica
programme.desc: Stingray Classica presents the most beloved masterpieces, breathtaking ballets, opulent operas, and enchanting chamber music! Start your classical music journey now to enjoy spectacular performances, recorded in the world’s grandest venues, featuring world-class conductors, singers, and soloists.

programme.title: DJazz
programme.desc: Whether you love acid jazz, big band, ragtime, mainstream jazz, or anything in between, experience the most diverse and in-depth concert, performance, and documentary programming on Stingray DJAZZ.

programme.title: Hit List
programme.desc: Tune in for a dose of today’s hits and a preview of tomorrow’s sensations. You’ll discover the next chart-toppers before everyone else!

programme.title: Hot Country
programme.desc: Hot Country rounds up brand new country hits and favorites from the past decade.

programme.title: Rock Alternative
programme.desc: Experience the intensity of the best alternative rock sound. Features hard-hitting acts like Arcade Fire, Billy Talent, The Black Keys, etc.

programme.title: Pop Adult
programme.desc: A romantic mix of pop adult classics. Features current hit makers like Adele and Maroon 5, and timeless favorites such as U2 and Madonna.

programme.title: Classic Rock
programme.desc: Return to the classic rock revolution of the ’60, ‘70s, and ’80 with legends like Janis Joplin, Peter Frampton, and The Rolling Stones.

programme.title: Remember the 80s
programme.desc: Relive your neon-bright ‘80s memories with the synth-pop sound of stars such as Michael Jackson, George Michael, and Whitney Houston.

programme.title: Éxitos del Momento
programme.desc: Dance along to today's hottest Latin music in genres such as salsa, samba, merengue, flamenco, tango, reggaeton, and reggae.

programme.title: Greatest Hits
programme.desc: A channel filled with the greatest hits by the most popular bands and artists of all time. A guaranteed crowd-pleaser for every occasion.

programme.title: HipHop and RnB
programme.desc: Turn up the volume on the grittiest sounds of today's hip hop scene, featuring hits by Beyoncé, T-Pain, Rick Ross, Nicki Minaj, etc.

programme.title: Flashback 70's
programme.desc: Travel back to an explosive decade in music when Abba, Jackson 5, Kool and the Gang, the Bee Gees, and Carole King reigned on the charts.

programme.title: Schwab Network
programme.desc: Empowering every investor and trader, every market day. Unlike traditional cable channels, the Schwab Network broadcasts streaming financial news and education without any filler, noise, or political bias. From live and on-demand content to commentary from industry pros, this programming doesn’t just bring you the news but interprets it.

programme.title: CJC Television Network
programme.desc: CJC Television Network is owned by Carl Jackson Motion Pictures Studios and is a family-themed network reaching over 70 million homes in the U.S. It features movies, series, and inspirational music concerts.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with a unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments. WPT events turned Gus Hansen into the Great Dane and Daniel Negreanu into Kid Poker, and created dozens of poker-made millionaires.

programme.title: Business Rockstars
programme.desc: Entrepreneur TV insight and perspectives from industries leading entrepreneurs and startups.

programme.title: Cinepride
programme.desc: Award winning LGBTQ cinema, from critically acclaimed dramas to underground cult hits.

programme.title: Dungeon TV
programme.desc: Follow the life and stories of 6 Dungeons and Dragons role-players in the early tide of an interactive war.

programme.title: Frightflix
programme.desc: Cult Horror, Sci-Fi and Grindhouse features that deliver shivers!

programme.title: Galxy
programme.desc: An Interstellar oasis of Film and TV from creators with a vision that is beyond the ordinary.

programme.title: Screendreams by Invincible
programme.desc: Enjoy the best in galleries, screensavers and wallpapers...home of the living fireplace.

programme.title: Slopes TV
programme.desc: Get ready to hit the slopes! Slopes TV is the world's first magazine style, snow, ski and snowboard channel

programme.title: Watchit Scream!
programme.desc: Some of the most terrifying visions the horror genre has put to film, curated from festivals around the world, sit back relax and Watch it Scream!

programme.title: Revry
programme.desc: Live LGBTQ+ TV with a focus on lifestyle and entertainment for the whole family.

programme.title: Revry Her
programme.desc: Welcome to Revry Her, the first 24/7 live TV channel exclusively catering to queer Womxn. Enjoy Femxle focused movies, television and digital series.

programme.title: Euronews
programme.desc: Europe’s leading international news channel. Its mission is to empower people to form their own opinion. Euronews is impartial with a diversity of viewpoints.

programme.title: Euronews Español
programme.desc: El único canal de noticias internacional con una perspectiva europea. Su misión es permitir que cada uno se forme su propia opinión. Euronews se define por su imparcialidad e independencia.

programme.title: XFC TV
programme.desc: Welcome to XFC TV! Home of the XFC FightWorld Network.

programme.title: Shop LC
programme.desc: Shop LC, the fastest growing video shopping network in America, offers you the lowest prices and greatest value guaranteed…From designer jewelry, watches, beauty products, fashionable apparel and handbags, great gift items and accessories… and so much more!! Shop LC, Delivering Joy 24/7/365!

programme.title: Journy
programme.desc: JOURNY is the only channel at the intersection of travel, art, and culture! Watch curated content focused on immersive experiences and unique storytelling.

programme.title: Real America's Voice
programme.desc: Delivering news programs and live-event coverage that captures the authentic voice and passion of real people all across America. Just Real News & Honest Views!

programme.title: True History
programme.desc: True History introduces you to the moments, places, and people that have shaped modern life with the world’s best and most dynamic professors as the stars of the show.

programme.title: Africanews
programme.desc: Africanews is the only multilingual media outlet covering the latest news and curating compelling stories across the continent from a pan-African perspective. Impartial and independent, Africanews delivers national, regional and international news, and creates a bridge between audiences across the continent and the diaspora.

programme.title: Watchit Kid!
programme.desc: An Epic Collection of Pop culture animation with never before seen originals for viewers of all ages, gamers and everyone!

programme.title: FUEL TV
programme.desc: FUEL TV is the only channel dedicated 24/7 to the core action sports of Skateboarding, Surfing, BMX, Snow, Mountain Bike, Wakeboard and all the lifestyle that surrounds them, where Music, Art and Fashion play a decisive role.

programme.title: Gusto TV
programme.desc: Gusto TV is the world's best food channel. With diverse cuisines, inspiring recipes, and dynamic hosts, our award-winning food programming is a feast for the eyes.

programme.title: 4K TRAVEL TV
programme.desc: 4K TRAVEL TV is a 4K channel with breathtaking images in impressive resolution to discover the most fascinating travel destinations, cultures, and heritage. With 4K TRAVEL you will discover the world in 4K. The most amazing destinations that will awaken your curiosity and make you want to know more. 4K TRAVEL takes you to discover the wonders of the world, flying over the most beautiful sites. 4K TRAVEL allows you to know the history of each city visited, its particularity, the origins of its creation and the habits of its people. Thanks to its 4K technology, 4K TRAVEL makes you dive into the image, with a very high definition and a depth of field close to a three-dimensional vision. Travel to new destinations every day, as if you were there.

programme.title: ENCORE+
programme.desc: All your movies in one place. From old to new, from classics to chillers and from laughs to thrillers, all the movies you ever wanted are now in one place. ENCORE+ is covering all genres. ENCORE+ is an iconic movie channel, with all the cult and must-see movies you must see at least once in your life. ENCORE+ is aimed at the largest number of viewers and takes you to the discovery of reference films released from 1980 to today and awarded in the biggest festivals or by peers. Most of us like to watch movies. Of course, the genres we like differ, but there's nothing better than getting lost in a different world filled with a story, setting and characters for a few hours. Thanks to ENCORE+, the whole family can agree and watch the movie they want. There is something for everyone.

programme.title: KOZOOM TV
programme.desc: Billiards is one of the most played game in the world. Kozoom TV offers free 24/7 billiards programming. You can watch tournaments from around the world, as well as original programming. For amateurs, it is easy to see your favorite players from all over the world compete on the biggest billiards stage! Kozoom TV is broadcasting all kind of billiards matches such as French Billiards, Carom Billiards, or Pool Billiards. Kozoom TV is made by Billiards Professional who live this Sport. But Kozoom TV is not only the biggest competitions, it is also learning how to play billiards with Masterclass videos and great matches of Carom and Pool commented by top players. Kozoom.com is the first European channel dedicated to billiard fans and offers the most complete experience to billiard lovers. Since 1998, Kozoom has been involved in the promotion of billiards, and now Kozoom TV brings you Billiards at home.

programme.title: Motorvision TV
programme.desc: Enjoy legendary races in motorsport history, great retro footage, spectacular supercars, breath-taking action and much more.

programme.title: Motorvision TV Español
programme.desc: Disfruta de carreras legendarias, la historia del automovilismo, superdeportivos espectaculares, motos, acción impresionante y mucho más.

programme.title: CCTV-4
programme.desc: CCTV-4 is a channel providing programs that integrate news and culture. With the purpose of inheriting the Chinese civilization in the service of Chinese speaking people living in the rest of the world, the channel mainly serves global Chinese speaking people and foreign nationals who know the Chinese language.

programme.title: CGTN
programme.desc: CGTN English is China Global Television Network’s flagship news channel, committed to providing its global audience with accurate, timely and objective news coverage. Headquartered in Beijing, it also has production centers in Nairobi, Washington D.C. and London, all staffed with international professionals from around the world.

programme.title: CGTN Documentary
programme.desc: CGTN Documentary is a satellite TV channel devoted solely to documentaries, broadcast 24/7. Its programs cover latest progresses in varied industries, listed world cultural heritage, people who changed the nation, and many more. All dubbed in English, CGTN Documentary is the only screen from which you can see the real lives of the Chinese and understand their history.

programme.title: CGTN Español
programme.desc: CGTN Español is one of CGTN´s general content channels, providing accurate、timely and objective information and rich audiovisual content to the Spanish language audience 24 hours a day. It aims to promote communication and understanding between China and the world, and enhance cultural exchanges and mutual trust between China and other countries.

programme.title: CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Embracing the process, trying new things, reveling in surprises and imperfections; all contribute to the immense satisfaction that comes from lifelong learning. CraftsyTV is your always-on portal for tapping into your talents by learning new skills and enhancing those you have.

programme.title: Jewish Life Television JLTV
programme.desc: Jewish Life Television is the nation's largest, most robust Jewish-themed television network. More cultural than religious, JLTV offers entertaining, high-quality programming appealing to viewers of all faiths interested in the history, lifestyle and experience of the Jewish people in the United States, in Israel and around the World.

programme.title: crema.tv
programme.desc: crema.tv is the world's only lifestyle entertainment channel about coffee! crema.tv guides you on all aspects of coffee making, coffee gear, coffee lifestyles, coffee cultures and so much more. Follow awesome coffee aficionados with their bean stories. Discover the soul of coffee – on crema.tv!

programme.title: Romance Channel
programme.desc: Romance Channel es un mundo donde cada historia de amor es única. ¿Buscas romance, drama, suspenso o comedia? ¡En nuestras películas lo encontrarás todo! Desde historias simples y conmovedoras hasta relatos complejos y cautivadores. Romance Channel – step into the world where every love story unfolds with an allure. Whether you're in the mood for romance, drama, mystery, or comedy, we've got films and TV series for everyone! From sweet tales of first love to more intricate plots.

programme.title: NTD News
programme.desc: An independent global news network delivering truthful and uncensored news from the US and beyond. We cover the issues that affect you and shape our world, without the political noise. We’re famous for our thoughtful in-depth analyses and our speciality—China coverage you won't find anywhere else.

programme.title: Mediacorp Entertainment – Chinese
programme.desc: Mediacorp Entertainment is the entertainment and lifestyle channel for the entire family! This is where you will find high-quality and innovative productions where stories are told through the lens of Asia. From love, action, thriller and family dramas to keep you at the edge of your seat, to food and travel programmes that bring you on a whirlwind journey of tastes and places, there’s something for everyone. Here you will also find a curated collection of Asian programmes in three languages, Chinese, English and Tamil.

programme.title: Mediacorp Entertainment – English
programme.desc: Mediacorp Entertainment is the entertainment and lifestyle channel for the entire family! This is where you will find high-quality and innovative productions where stories are told through the lens of Asia. From love, action, thriller and family dramas to keep you at the edge of your seat, to food and travel programmes that bring you on a whirlwind journey of tastes and places, there’s something for everyone. Here you will also find a curated collection of Asian programmes in three languages, Chinese, English and Tamil.

programme.title: Mediacorp Entertainment – Tamil
programme.desc: Mediacorp Entertainment is the entertainment and lifestyle channel for the entire family! This is where you will find high-quality and innovative productions where stories are told through the lens of Asia. From love, action, thriller and family dramas to keep you at the edge of your seat, to food and travel programmes that bring you on a whirlwind journey of tastes and places, there’s something for everyone. Here you will also find a curated collection of Asian programmes in three languages, Chinese, English and Tamil.

programme.title: The Reuters 60
programme.desc: Catch up on what’s happening in the world in 60 minutes with Reuters News.

programme.title: UnchainedTV
programme.desc: UnchainedTV is your portal to a fun, joyful lifestyle that will optimize your health, save the planet and rescue animals.

programme.title: POWERtube TV
programme.desc: POWERtube TV features racing, high-performance builds, grassroots motorsports, and classic hit series such as PINKS, Pass Time, and PINKS All Out.

programme.title: Screams TV by Trinian
programme.desc: Trinian Screams TV – where nightmares never end! Watch the scariest horror movies, from bone-chilling classics to modern-day terrors. Dare to watch?

programme.title: Gritos TV by Trinian
programme.desc: Trinian Gritos TV - ¡donde las pesadillas nunca terminan! Vea las películas de terror más espeluznantes, desde los clásicos más escalofriantes hasta los terrores de hoy en día. ¿Te atreves?

programme.title: Mi Raza Canal
programme.desc: Un canal con contenido mexicano y latinoamericano. Ofrece una amplia gama de entretenimiento, incluyendo películas independientes, películas de acción, comedias, documentales y series. El canal presenta la cultura mexicana, contenido sobre el narcotráfico y obras de cineastas latinos.

programme.title: Mi Raza Canal Plus
programme.desc: Películas y series contemporáneas de primer nivel de México, América Latina y España, dobladas o producidas en español.

programme.title: Mi Miedo Canal
programme.desc: Aquí encontraras las mejores películas de terror, y ciencia ficción de México y el mundo hispano hablante, el mejor cine de terror de cada país

programme.title: CGTN Global Biz
programme.desc: CGTN Global Biz delivers authoritative business and tech news, high-level interviews, and in-depth features on China’s economic growth from a global viewpoint. It connects Chinese and international audiences, tracks market shifts, and highlights cutting-edge advances—offering a vital window into global trends.

programme.title: China Travel
programme.desc: Explore China’s diverse culture, history, and scenic beauty—from its heartland to remote corners. Join us as we journey through this captivating country and discover the stories of its people.

programme.title: Discovering China
programme.desc: Discovering China features high-quality programs under themes like “Vibrant China,” “Beautiful China,” and “Historical China.” It showcases modern life, innovation, history, and nature while highlighting China’s global interactions. A world of wonders awaits!

programme.title: Daystar TV
programme.desc: Daystar is one of the most widely recognized Christian television networks globally, reaching millions of viewers across 200+ countries and territories. Daystar has established itself as a trusted source for inspirational content, including faith-based teachings, uplifting music, and family-friendly programming.

programme.title: Daystar Español
programme.desc: Daystar Español transmite contenido cristiano en español, 24 horas al día, los 7 días de la semana. Nuestro objetivo es difundir el Evangelio de Jesucristo, ofrecer programas de fe, adoración, enseñanza bíblica, testimonios, música cristiana y contenido para familias hispanohablantes. Llegamos a millones de hogares en Estados Unidos: cubrimos más del 90 % de los hogares hispanos con televisión en EE.UU. También transmitimos a toda Latinoamérica, e incluso tenemos cobertura internacional en otras regiones del mundo. Daystar Español es considera una de las redes cristianas en español de mayor crecimiento mundial.

programme.title: Golf Network
programme.desc: Golf Network is a premium golf channel showcasing Japan’s top professional golfers, delivered in English for international audiences. Featuring expert instruction, tournaments and training content, it offers a unique window into Japanese excellence and precision in golf.

programme.title: Foosball TV
programme.desc: Foosball TV is the dedicated channel for table soccer lovers, featuring international competitions, top players and spectacular matches. A fast-paced and skill-driven sport, now showcased for fans worldwide in a dynamic and entertaining format.

programme.title: CUISINE CULTURE
programme.desc: CUISINE CULTURE is an interactive channel that brings you tutorials for the top recipes from the world’s best known chefs.

programme.title: Trufa
programme.desc: Trufa es tu canal de cocina con recetas sencillas para preparar en casa, combinadas con contenidos de gastronomía y humor. Un espacio fresco y entretenido para disfrutar la cocina de forma fácil y divertida. Trufa is your go-to food channel, featuring easy-to-make recipes at home, blended with gastronomy and humor. A fresh and entertaining space to enjoy cooking in a simple and fun way.

programme.title: Wai Lana
programme.desc: Wai Lana is a wellness channel dedicated to yoga, relaxation and mindful living. Featuring Wai Lana’s yoga sessions, music and lifestyle content, it offers a peaceful and inspiring space to reconnect body and mind.

programme.title: BOLLYWOOD 4U
programme.desc: BOLLYWOOD 4U is a premium Hindi cinema channel showcasing a diverse selection of unique and original Indian films. Focused on fresh voices and authentic storytelling, it offers an alternative window into the richness of Indian cinema beyond the mainstream.

programme.title: BOLLYWOOD TV
programme.desc: BOLLYWOOD TV is your ultimate destination for Hindi entertainment, featuring a wide selection of movies and series from timeless classics to the latest hits. Blending action, drama, romance and comedy, it delivers nonstop Bollywood magic for audiences worldwide.

programme.title: The Homestyle Channel
programme.desc: The Homestyle Channel is your one stop for everything HOME, from DIY to Design to Remodeling. Our group of professionals will show audiences how to organize their kitchens, design a picture wall, and learn about mortgage rates and loans. Homestyle is for everyone; renters, new home owners, and seasoned buyers and sellers.

programme.title: HUNT FISH TV
programme.desc: HUNT FISH TV is a family-friendly outdoor channel from Outdoor Media Group, featuring hunting, fishing and nature adventures. Blending action, lifestyle and educational content, it celebrates outdoor sports as a way of life to share across generations.

programme.title: SPORT FISHING TV
programme.desc: When fishing isn’t just a sport but a way of life. Follow Dan Hernandez to catch more fish around the world.

programme.title: Absinthe TV
programme.desc: Absinthe TV: The Adventure Sports Channel. The best in SURF, SKATE, SNOW, ART, MUSIC and ADVENTURE!

programme.title: AMERICA'S BOATING CHANNEL
programme.desc: AMERICA’S BOATING CHANNEL™ is a family-friendly marine entertainment channel featuring boating education, Coast Guard training, naval series, boat races and sea-themed movies. A unique destination to explore life on the water through adventure, learning and fun.

programme.title: CHRONO TV
programme.desc: CHORNO TV brings you the great moments of motorsport, in the intimacy of the F1 drivers and the teams.

programme.title: DRIVE + SPEED
programme.desc: DRIVE + SPEED is your go-to destination for the epitome of Formula 1 excitement

programme.title: FIGHT TV
programme.desc: FIGHT TV is the channel devoted to broadcasting combat sports, including Wrestling, Boxing, Mixed Martial Arts, K1, MuayThaï, Kung-Fu, and training tips.

programme.title: HORROR TV
programme.desc: HORROR TV is a premium movie channel dedicated to the best of horror cinema, featuring a wide selection of chilling films from cult classics to modern thrillers. A must-watch destination for fans of dark and intense storytelling.

programme.title: TEST MY RIDE
programme.desc: Challenge a Formula 1 driver with your own car! Test My Ride gives drivers the opportunity to go head to head against the ex-Formula 1 driver Mika Salo.

programme.title: THALAA TV
programme.desc: THALAA TV showcases iconic Tamil films from the 1970s to the late 1990s, featuring legendary South Indian stars such as Rajinikanth, Kamal Haasan, Gemini Ganesan, Jayalalithaa, Vijay and Sridevi. A tribute to the golden era of Tamil cinema.

programme.title: TOLLY TV
programme.desc: TOLLY TV is dedicated to classic Telugu cinema, showcasing iconic films from the golden era of South Indian movies. Featuring legendary stars and unforgettable stories, it offers a unique journey into the rich heritage of Telugu filmmaking.

programme.title: THE RING TV
programme.desc: THE RING TV is a combat sports channel featuring events across wrestling, boxing and MMA. From explosive matches to behind-the-scenes content and interviews, it delivers an immersive experience for fight fans worldwide.

programme.title: TyC Sports FAN
programme.desc: A premium football channel dedicated to Argentine soccer, featuring matches, highlights and exclusive programming. From legendary clubs to rising stars, TyC Sports FAN delivers an authentic and high-energy football experience that connects fans worldwide to the passion of Argentine football.

programme.title: FUEL TV
programme.desc: FUEL TV is the only channel dedicated 24/7 to the core action sports of Skateboarding, Surfing, BMX, Snow, Mountain Bike, Wakeboard and all the lifestyle that surrounds them, where Music, Art and Fashion play a decisive role.

programme.title: Journy
programme.desc: JOURNY is the only channel at the intersection of travel, art, and culture! Watch curated content focused on immersive experiences and unique storytelling.

programme.title: TyC Sports FAN
programme.desc: Un canal premium de fútbol dedicado al fútbol argentino, con partidos, momentos destacados y programación exclusiva. Desde clubes legendarios hasta nuevas promesas, TyC Sports FAN ofrece una experiencia auténtica y vibrante que conecta a los fans de todo el mundo con la pasión del fútbol argentino.
